title: ESCC knowledge-layer controlled vocabulary
description: Closed sets for the role / segment / competitor tags on product-knowledge entries (ADR-0012), plus a HubSpot jobtitle->role map with an explicit fallback. Free-text tags are forbidden — they silently break the retrieval join — so ingest validates an entry's role/segment/competitor against these sets. `segments` formalizes the store's existing INDUSTRY values (not the size-tier overlays in rules/segments/). The disk-loading unit test validates the committed config/knowledge-vocab.json against this schema and asserts cross-field integrity (every mapped role and the fallback are in `roles`; `general` is in both `roles` and `segments`).

title_to_role.description: Ordered, first-match-wins. Each rule maps any matched lowercased job-title substring to a role. More specific roles come first.

fallback_role.description: Role used when a title matches no rule (unknown -> general, which still retrieves general proof — never a crash).
